root_text.an9.21:1.1: “Tīhi, bhikkhave, ṭhānehi uttarakurukā manussā deve ca tāvatiṁse adhiggaṇhanti jambudīpake ca manusse.
root_text.an9.21:1.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhi ṭhānehi uttarakurukā manussā deve ca tāvatiṁse adhiggaṇhanti jambudīpake ca manusse.
root_text.an9.21:2.1: Tīhi, bhikkhave, ṭhānehi devā tāvatiṁsā uttarakuruke ca manusse adhiggaṇhanti jambudīpake ca manusse.
root_text.an9.21:2.3: Dibbena āyunā, dibbena vaṇṇena, dibbena sukhena—
root_text.an9.21:2.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhi ṭhānehi devā tāvatiṁsā uttarakuruke ca manusse adhiggaṇhanti jambudīpake ca manusse.
root_text.an9.21:3.1: Tīhi, bhikkhave, ṭhānehi jambudīpakā manussā uttarakuruke ca manusse adhiggaṇhanti deve ca tāvatiṁse.
root_text.an9.21:3.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhi ṭhānehi jambudīpakā manussā uttarakuruke ca manusse adhiggaṇhanti deve ca tāvatiṁse”ti.

translation_text.an9.21:1.1: “The humans of the land north of Kuru surpass the gods of the thirty-three and the humans of the Black Plum Tree Land in three particulars.
translation_text.an9.21:1.3: They’re selfless and not possessive. They have a fixed lifespan. They have a distinctive nature.
translation_text.an9.21:1.4: The humans of the land north of Kuru surpass the gods of the thirty-three and the humans of the Black Plum Tree Land in these three particulars.
translation_text.an9.21:2.1: The gods of the thirty-three surpass the humans of the land north of Kuru and the Black Plum Tree Land in three particulars.
translation_text.an9.21:2.4: The gods of the thirty-three surpass the humans of the land north of Kuru and the Black Plum Tree Land in these three particulars.
translation_text.an9.21:3.1: The humans of the Black Plum Tree Land surpass the humans of the land north of Kuru and the gods of the thirty-three in three particulars.
translation_text.an9.21:3.3: Bravery, mindfulness, and the spiritual life is lived here.
translation_text.an9.21:3.4: The humans of the Black Plum Tree Land surpass the humans of the land north of Kuru and the gods of the thirty-three in these three particulars.”
